full_text:
Ehe Shaoge 餓何燒戈
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ehe Shaoge (餓何燒戈). Sent with Chen Tai, he was tricked and fell into a pit. Committed suicide. Ehe Shaoge was affiliated with Qiang.
